top_signals.title: Warsh Taps Ex-BOE Chief King for New Fed Communications Task Force
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has tapped former Bank of England Governor Mervyn King to co-chair the US central bank’s new task force on communications.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: GDP deflators at market prices, and money GDP June 2026 (Quarterly National Accounts)
top_signals.summary: This document contains the latest gross domestic product (GDP) deflators. The GDP deflator can be viewed as a measure of general inflation in the domestic economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: GM reports 4.2% decline in Q2 U.S. sales as EV demand falls
top_signals.summary: General Motors' second-quarter U.S. sales fell 4.2% as year-over-year demand for its all-electric vehicles and Chevrolet Silverado pickup trucks declined.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Whole of Government Accounts 2025 to 2026: guidance for preparers
top_signals.summary: Guidance for central government and local government preparers for Whole of Government Accounts.

top_signals.title: Five things we learnt from Trump’s financial disclosure
top_signals.summary: The US president earned more than $1bn from digital currency interests as well as real estate and stock trades
